title: bidens nudata
intro: Bidens nudata, also known as Nudata Beggar's Lice or Nudata Bedstraw, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of terpenoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Bidens nudata include the potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
